title: The Great Day
content:
Hurrah for revolution and more cannon-shot!
A beggar upon horseback lashes a beggar on foot.
Hurrah for revolution and cannon come again!
The beggars have changed places, but the lash goes on.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Great Day"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
